title: 🌀 Quasiperiodic Structures (Penrose Tiling)
name: Quasiperiodic Structures (Penrose Tiling)
what_it_is: Patterns that never repeat but still follow strict logic. Often used in quasicrystals and sacred geometry. Penrose tiling is the most famous.
how_to_use: her armor is grown from Penrose tiling—geometric truth in chaotic logic
the floor is quasiperiodic—no tile repeats, yet all fits together in symmetry
animation_behavior: New tiles appear without repetition, structures unfold in aperiodic bloom ---
